ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 36 (D)

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-27-2007 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS DANIEL ESTRADA AND GLORIA ESTRADA'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 4/14/08 @ 11:15 AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF TO CONTACT THE CLERK IN DEPT. 220 TO SCHEDULE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCES. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES AND TIMES TO ALL PARTIES. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 1/25/08, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE INFORMATION REGARDING PROPOSITION 51 WITNESSES AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES BY 2/15/08. IF DEFENDANTS LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS, CLERK: E. BURA, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON OCT-15-2008. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 206 ON APR-14-2008 AT 11:15 AM FOR TRIAL. (206)
